sections.paragraph:
Original: בּדד

Transliteration: bâdad

Phonetic: baw-dad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to withdraw, be separate, be isolated
    1. (Qal) an army straggler (participle)
      1. of Ephraim (metaphorically)
  2. (TWOT) alone

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 201

Part(s) of speech: Verb
